description: Alice schedules a doctor appointment on Tuesday at 2:30 PM at Riverside Medical Center, expecting to be done by 4 PM.

events.title: Doctor Appointment
events.reasoning: Alice booked a doctor's appointment for Tuesday at 2:30 PM at Riverside Medical Center. She asked to block out until 4 PM, indicating the event ends around 4:00 PM.
events.assumptions: End time set to 4:00 PM based on Alice's explicit request to block the afternoon until around 4.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: doctor appointment on Tuesday at 2:30 PM.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday), so 'Tuesday' resolves to 2026-02-24. End time derived from Alice's statement 'block out until around 4'.
